title: Green Access Partners V.C. backs Cryptool
content_html:
Cryptool is proud to announce a new partnership with Green Access Partners V.C.

The collaboration brings three things to the Cryptool ecosystem:

  • A venture team focused on driving innovation in early-stage tech
  • Hands-on guidance from experienced operators
  • Investment backing to support our roadmap

Green Access Partners share our long-term view on responsible, transparent crypto investment management, and we are excited to build with them.
author: Cryptool
